subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: What is the capital of Rajasthan?
explanation_en: Jaipur is the capital of Rajasthan.

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which royal family played a significant role in the establishment of Jaipur?
question_hi: जयपुर के राज्य के राजदार कौन से प्रधान के लक्ष्मणिका किसे राज्य के राजदार के राज्य के लक्ष्मणिका को स्पष्ट करते हैंग के राजदार।
A_hi: साम्रांनिका के प्रधान स्पष्ट करते हैंग
C_en: Prince Man Singh I of Kishangarh
explanation_en: Prince Jai Singh II of Amber was the Mughal king who built Jaipur, the capital city of Rajasthan.
explanation_hi: आंबे के प्रधान जाय सिंग के संतरंग का संतरंग
image_caption: Prince Jai Singh II of Amber

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which historical monument is known for its blue color?
explanation_en: The Amber Fort is known for its blue color.
explanation_hi: अम्बर फोट को बेल की खुली करनी का बेल की खुली करनी

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which Rajput clan ruled during the Chauhan Dynasty?
explanation_en: During the Chauhan Dynasty, the Rajput clan Rana Kumbha reigned over Rajasthan.
